<!-- autogenerated using templates/2-data/makefile-agents.md.ontoRepo.tpl -->
## `./Makefile`

### Docs:

`render-templates` render *.ontoRepo.tpl onto the repo (.env, makefile.agents.md, repo-structure.md, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, README.md)

### CI:

`repo-ci-prepare-hooks` install lefthook git hooks
`repo-ci-precommit-all`: `repo-ci-prepare-hooks` run pre-commit hooks over all files (not just staged)

### Terraform:

`init` init the backend and providers
`fmt` format all terraform files in place
`validate` check formatting and validate the config
`lock` regenerate the provider lock with hashes for all CI + dev platforms
`plan` show the plan (writes tf/plan.tfplan for CI)
`apply` apply the saved plan (plan.tfplan)
